summary: Material Cost by SMR / Execution Package (5 Phases) - All 28 tests passed. Complete backend testing for Material Entry Linkage, Material Actual Cost by Exec Package, Budget/Actual/Variance Recompute, Package Financial Summary with Margin, and Warnings + Profit Integration.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing project with execution packages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Material SMR fully tested. Project c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da (code PRJ-001) has 3 execution packages and 9 material entries (all unmapped due to name mismatch - this is expected). Name mismatch is by design: warehouse materials have names like 'Гипсова мазилка Knauf', 'Грунд универсален' while planned materials have 'Материали за: TEST_Activity_1'. No material cost has been mapped to packages (actual=0, budget from planned_materials).

P1: POST /api/material-entries/sync/{pro.notes: Synced 9 entries from warehouse_transactions (issues). Clears old synced entries, creates new from issues/returns/consumption. Uses case-insensitive material_name matching for planned_materials lookup.

P1: GET /api/material-entries filters by.notes: All 3 filter parameters working correctly. Returns sorted by date DESC with proper structure.

P1: Unmapped entries preserved when no p.notes: 9 entries are unmapped (mapped=false, execution_package_id=null, planned_material_id=null). Name mismatch is expected: warehouse uses 'Гипсова мазилка Knauf', planned uses 'Материали за: TEST_Activity_1'.

P2: GET /api/material-cost/by-execution-.notes: Returns material_budget, material_actual_cost, material_variance, total_issued_qty, total_returned_qty, net_qty, by_material array. Package TEST_Activity_1: budget=1725 EUR, actual=0 EUR.

P3: POST /api/execution-packages/recompu.notes: Recomputed 3 packages. Updates material_budget_total, actual_material_cost, material_variance_value, material_variance_percent.

P3: Budget derived from planned_material.notes: Budget values correctly linked from planned_materials to execution packages via execution_package_id.

P4: GET /api/execution-packages/{id}/fin.notes: Returns complete financial summary: sale_total, budget (material/labor/total), actual (material/labor/subcontract/total), margin (gross_margin/margin_percent/expected_margin/margin_variance).

P4: GET /api/execution-packages/financia.notes: Returns array of 3 packages with sale/budget/actual/variance fields for material and labor.

P4: Margin = sale - (material + labor +.notes: TEST_Activity_1: margin=2435.24 (has actuals). TEST_Activity_2 and Test Activity 38ddb48a: margin=null (no actuals).

P5: GET /api/material-warnings/{project_.notes: Returns warnings array with type and message. Found 1 warning: 'unmapped_material_entries' - 9 of 9 entries unmapped.

P5: GET /api/project-profit includes mat.notes: material_detail: total_cost=43.2 EUR, mapped_cost=0 EUR, unmapped_cost=43.2 EUR, budget_total=3412.5 EUR, variance=-3369.3 EUR, has_data=true.

Backend: No fabricated costs when data m.notes: Consumption entries have unit_cost=null, total_cost=null. Partial data flagged via partial_cost_data field.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
